text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Sirius, I was just wondering—do you remember
that time we went camping together?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Can't say I do. Must not have been worth
remembering.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Sirius... I was in the mood for a little
reminiscence, so I was organizing my old albums
and found a photo of us.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I recall correctly... You snuck me out of the tent
with you to go look for a star.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Don't go changing the story! You made me take you out to go look at the moon!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, now you mention it, that's right. I'm glad
you remember it so clearly.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You just jogged my memory is all! Damn it...
what's so good about the moon anyways?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The moon's light has long been a beacon in the
dark. I aspire to be such a guiding influence
myself. And I told you that, right? And then you—

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Just kept looking at the star... You don't need to
retell the whole story.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's right, you had your eyes on that star. You
were gazing up at your inspiration, just as I was.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A star that's burned its light into countless
civilizations, its scorching white-hot glow brighter
than any of its celestial peers.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: And it's gonna outshine the moon too, "Emperor."
